meta_desc: DewSecure focuses on providing high-level smart contract auditing, DeFi security defense, automated vulnerability scanning, and comprehensive on-chain tracking.
placeholder_text: 🚀 Under reconstruction, new features coming soon...
sol_intro_desc: Providing security, compliance solutions, and risk management for your SME or personal websites.
comp_intro_desc: DewSecure is a premier Web3 security platform founded by seasoned industry experts, integrating deep penetration testing, advanced source code auditing, and full-spectrum security solutions. With years of active presence on major bug bounty platforms and extensive involvement in penetration testing and high-level code auditing for numerous projects, DewSecure has amassed deep hands-on expertise. As AI redefines security boundaries and reshapes the global cybersecurity landscape, bringing unprecedented and complex challenges, DewSecure remains steadfast in safeguarding the digital world's line of defense.
disc_intro_desc: Legal compliance and limitation of liability statement for DewSecure security services.
disc_d1: Penetration testing, code auditing, and consulting services provided by DewSecure are intended to help discover and remediate risks. All tests are conducted within the scope of written authorization.
disc_d2: Despite professional techniques, due to evolving attack methods and environmental complexity, we cannot guarantee that tested systems will be absolutely free of vulnerabilities in the future.
disc_d3: Testing may involve access to client systems or networks. DewSecure is not liable for losses caused by third-party products, services, or failure to patch vulnerabilities in time.
disc_d4: Information on this site is for reference only and does not constitute professional legal or technical advice. DewSecure reserves the right to modify content without notice.
disc_d5: Reports, tools, and methodologies generated during the service belong to DewSecure unless otherwise agreed in writing.
disc_d6: To the maximum extent permitted by law, DewSecure is not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use this service.
hero_desc: DewSecure is a premier Web3 security platform built by a team of elite specialists, integrating deep penetration testing, advanced source code auditing, and comprehensive security architecture. Entrust your audits to us to ensure your projects and web ecosystems consistently thrive in a robust, bulletproof environment.
modal_matrix_slogan: Built on technology. Driven by integrity.
modal_subtitle: Enhance your project with a professional Web3 security provider.
